title: Bali, Indonesia — 4 Nights 5 Days (5-Star)
highlights: Watersports package at Tanjung Benoa (parasailing, banana boat, jet ski)
Explore cliff-top Uluwatu Temple with Kecak and Fire dance performance
Sunset dinner cruise aboard the Bounty Cruise with live music & buffet
Ubud cultural tour including Ubud Palace and Ubud Market
inclusions: 4 Nights accommodation at a 5-Star Hotel
Daily breakfast (B) and Sunset Dinner Cruise (D)
All transfers on private basis
English-speaking guide assistance
Tanjung Benoa watersport package
Indonesia e-visa guidance for Nepal/Bangladesh passport holders
exclusions: Personal expenses, optional tours, travel insurance, tips
visaChecklist: Copy of passport valid for at least 6 months
Passport size photograph with white background (no cap/makeup)
Last 3 months' bank statement with minimum balance of USD 2000 / NPR 300,000 (name must match passport)
Marriage certificate (if spouse accompanies)
Visa processing takes 7–8 working days
termsAndConditions: 50% advance payment required at time of booking
Price calculated per person on twin-sharing basis
Surcharge may apply for client-requested changes to the itinerary
Based on minimum 20 pax traveling together — price may change if pax count is not met
Full amount non-refundable after confirmation
Standard hotel check-in: 14:00/15:00; check-out: 11:00/12:00

itinerary.title: Arrival in Bali
itinerary.description: Arrive at Ngurah Rai Airport, Denpasar. Clear immigration & customs. Meet & greet with guide and transfer to your 5-star hotel. Rest of the day at leisure. Overnight in Bali.

itinerary.title: Tanjung Benoa Watersports & Uluwatu Temple Cliff Sunset (B)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Proceed to Tanjung Benoa for an exciting watersport package (includes parasailing/donut boat, banana boat, jet ski. Optional extras: snorkeling, sea walker, fly fish). In the afternoon, visit the dramatic Uluwatu Temple perched on a cliff-top and watch the sunset Kecak and Fire dance performance.

itinerary.title: Tanah Lot Temple & Sunset Dinner Cruise (B, D)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Visit the 17th-century Tanah Lot Temple, built on a large offshore rock and surrounded by sea waves. Evening transfer to Benoa Harbour for a Sunset Dinner Cruise aboard the Bounty Cruise. Enjoy live music, a buffet dinner, and a cabaret dance show.

itinerary.title: Denpasar City & Ubud Cultural Tour (B)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Take a photo stop at the Bajra Sandi Monument, then visit Tohpati (famous Batik village), Batuan Temple, and Ubud Center (includes Ubud Palace & Ubud Market). Overnight in Bali.

itinerary.title: Departure from Bali (B)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Free time until check-out (12:00). Private transfer to Ngurah Rai Airport for your return flight.

title: Bali, Indonesia — Standard Package (3-Star)
highlights: Round-trip air ticket included in the package
Water sports at Tanjung Benoa beach
Visit Ubud traditional crafts center & Goa Gajah cave
Tanah Lot Temple & Jimbaran Bay BBQ seafood dinner
inclusions: Round-trip air ticket
4 Nights' accommodation at a 3-Star Hotel
Daily breakfast (B) and Jimbaran BBQ Dinner (D)
Meals & sightseeing per itinerary
All airport and hotel transfers
All entrance fees to listed sites
Standard e-visa processing
exclusions: Optional tours not listed in the itinerary
visaChecklist: Standard Indonesian e-visa is processed by the agency
Copy of passport biographical page (minimum 6 months validity)
Digital passport photograph
termsAndConditions: 50% payment required at time of booking to hold seats
Prices are calculated per person on a twin/double-sharing basis
Standard hotel check-in: 14:00/15:00; check-out: 11:00/12:00
Flights are subject to availability and airline policies

itinerary.title: Arrival & Transfer to Hotel
itinerary.description: Airport clearance and immigration. Meet & greet with local coordinator and transfer to your 3-star hotel. Rest of the day at leisure. Overnight in Bali.

itinerary.title: Water Sports & Ubud Cultural Exploration (B)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Visit Tanjung Benoa for water sports (includes jet ski). Afterwards, transfer to Ubud — Bali's center for traditional crafts and dance. Visit terraced rice paddies, Goa Gajah ('Elephant Cave') archaeological site, and Gunung Kawi rock-cut shrines.

itinerary.title: Tanah Lot Tour & Jimbaran Bay BBQ Seafood Dinner (B, D)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Morning at leisure. In the afternoon, visit the famous Tanah Lot Temple. Transfer to Jimbaran Bay in the evening for a romantic BBQ seafood dinner on the beach. Return to hotel.

itinerary.title: Phinisi Sailor Cruise Excursion (B)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Enjoy a full-day sailing trip aboard a traditional Phinisi sailor cruise. Experience ocean views, relaxation, and tropical island vibes.

itinerary.title: Departure from Bali (B)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Check out of the hotel and transfer to the airport for your return flight.

title: Singapore – Malaysia — 6 Nights 7 Days (Version A)
highlights: Explore Singapore's Merlion, Chinatown, and Orchard Road
Sentosa Island Tour with one-way cable car and Wings of Time show
Genting Highlands day trip with Batu Caves photo stop
Kuala Lumpur City Tour featuring Petronas Twin Towers photo stop
inclusions: 2 Nights in Singapore (3-Star Hotel)
3 Nights in Kuala Lumpur (3-Star Hotel)
Daily breakfast (B)

Sentosa Island Tour (1-way cable car + Wings of Time tickets)
Genting Highland Tour with Batu Caves stop
All airport/hotel transfers
Round-trip airfare
Malaysia e-visa fee

2 recent passport-size photos with white background (no glasses/cap)

Price per person on twin-sharing basis

Full amount non-refundable after confirmation
Standard hotel check-in: 14:00/15:00, check-out: 11:00/12:00

itinerary.title: Arrival in Singapore & Landmarks City Tour
itinerary.description: Arrive in Singapore. Meet your representative and transfer to your hotel. Afternoon Singapore city tour covering Suntec City (Fountain of Wealth), Padang area, Merlion, Chocolate Gallery, Chinatown, Jewellery City (Alexandra Rd), Little India, and Orchard Road. Overnight in Singapore.

itinerary.title: Sentosa Island Afternoon Excursion (B)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Morning free for leisure. In the afternoon, proceed for a Sentosa Island tour including a scenic 1-way cable car ride and the Wings of Time multi-sensory water and light spectacular show. Overnight in Singapore.

itinerary.title: Coach Transfer to Kuala Lumpur (B)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Check out and board the air-conditioned express coach transfer from Singapore to Kuala Lumpur. Meet our driver on arrival and check into your hotel. Overnight in Kuala Lumpur.

itinerary.title: Genting Highland Tour & Batu Caves Stop (B)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Embark on a full-day Genting Highland tour. En route, make a photo stop at the famous Batu Caves. Ascend to Genting via a scenic cable car ride. Enjoy free time to explore theme parks and the casino. Lunch included. Return to Kuala Lumpur for overnight.

itinerary.title: Kuala Lumpur City Highlights Tour (B)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Half-day city tour visiting King's Palace, National Monument, Masjid India, Beryl's Chocolate Factory, and a photo stop at the Petronas Twin Towers. (Optional KL Tower observation deck entrance not included). Rest of the day free for shopping. Overnight in Kuala Lumpur.

itinerary.title: Departure from Kuala Lumpur (B)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Free time until your scheduled airport transfer for your return flight back to Kathmandu.

title: Singapore – Malaysia — 6 Nights 7 Days (Version B)
highlights: Marina Bay Sands and Merlion Park photo spots in Singapore
Sentosa Island cable car and sights
Genting Highlands mountain resort day trip
Kuala Lumpur Twin Towers and City Landmarks
inclusions: Round-trip air ticket
Malaysia visa fees & coordination

4 Nights in Kuala Lumpur (3-Star Hotel)

termsAndConditions: 50% payment required at time of booking to secure flights and rooms
Price calculated on twin-sharing basis
Itinerary dates are fixed (Sample schedule April 9–15)
Flights are non-refundable after confirmation

itinerary.title: Arrival in Singapore & City Landmarks Tour
itinerary.description: Arrival at Singapore Changi Airport. Meet local transfer driver and transfer to your hotel. In the afternoon, explore Marina Bay Sands, Merlion Park, Chinatown, and Little India. Overnight in Singapore.

itinerary.title: Sentosa Island Scenic Tour
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Set out for an afternoon tour of Sentosa Island, experiencing cable car rides and island attractions. Overnight in Singapore.

itinerary.title: Singapore to Kuala Lumpur Coach Journey
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Check out and board the coach transfer linking Singapore to Kuala Lumpur. On arrival, transfer to your hotel. Overnight in Kuala Lumpur.

itinerary.title: Genting Highland Day Excursion
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Travel to the cool Genting Highlands, riding the cable car to the peak. Return to Kuala Lumpur in the evening for overnight.

itinerary.title: Kuala Lumpur City Highlights
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Discover Kuala Lumpur's landmark historical sites and enjoy shopping districts. Overnight in Kuala Lumpur.

itinerary.title: Free & Leisure Day
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. A fully free day to shop at Bukit Bintang malls or explore KL on your own. Overnight in Kuala Lumpur.

itinerary.title: Departure from Kuala Lumpur
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Check out of the hotel and transfer to Kuala Lumpur International Airport for your flight back home.

title: Beijing – Shanghai, China — 5 Nights 6 Days
highlights: Forbidden City outside view and historic Temple of Heaven
Ascend the Great Wall of China at Juyong Pass
Travel via high-speed second-class bullet train from Beijing to Shanghai
Shanghai city sights including The Bund and Nanjing Road
inclusions: 3 Nights accommodation in Beijing
2 Nights accommodation in Shanghai
Daily breakfast (B)
2nd-class high-speed bullet train ticket from Beijing to Shanghai
All tours & transfers per itinerary
English-speaking guide
Listed entrance fees to tourist attractions
exclusions: Guide and driver tips (Compulsory: USD 4 per person per day)
visaChecklist: China group tourist visa stamp processed by the agency
Original passport valid for 6+ months
Required digital visa photograph
termsAndConditions: 50% payment required at time of confirmation
Based on twin-sharing standard room allocations
Hotel grades are subject to availability
GDS flight tickets booked separately by guest or handled via custom quote

itinerary.title: Arrival in Beijing
itinerary.description: Arrive in Beijing. Meet your local driver at the airport and transfer to your hotel. Enjoy free time to rest. Overnight in Beijing.

itinerary.title: Beijing City Tour & Imperial Palaces (B)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Set off on a city tour visiting the outside of the Forbidden City (the massive 15th-century imperial palace complex). Move on to the Temple of Heaven, containing the Echo Wall and Triple-sound stones. Overnight in Beijing.

itinerary.title: Great Wall of China & Olympic Park (B)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Visit the ancient Great Wall at Juyong Pass, a key historical defense system covering over 60 hectares. Take an outside photo stop of the Olympic Bird's Nest stadium and go shopping at local markets. Overnight in Beijing.

itinerary.title: Bullet Train Beijing to Shanghai (B)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Check out. Transfer to the railway station for your 2nd-class high-speed bullet train journey to Shanghai. Met by local driver in Shanghai and transfer to your hotel. Overnight in Shanghai.

itinerary.title: Shanghai City Sights Tour (B)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Visit the serene Jade Buddha Temple, Yu Yuan Market, Xin Tian Di area, the historic Bund waterfront, and Nanjing Road shopping avenue. Overnight in Shanghai.

itinerary.title: Departure from Shanghai (B)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Check out from the hotel. Transfer to the airport for your final departure flight.

title: Beijing – Shanghai, China — 6 Nights 7 Days
highlights: Includes all Beijing & Shanghai sights of the 6-day package
Evening Huangpu River Cruise dinner experience in Shanghai
Bullet train high-speed transition between cities
inclusions: 3 Nights accommodation in Beijing
3 Nights accommodation in Shanghai
Daily breakfast (B)
2nd-class high-speed bullet train Beijing to Shanghai
Tours, transfers, and English-speaking guide
Listed site entrance fees
Huangpu River Cruise dinner package
exclusions: Guide and driver tips (Compulsory: USD 4 per person per day)
visaChecklist: China group visa processed by the agency
Passport biographical page copy and photograph
termsAndConditions: 50% payment required at booking
Rates based on minimum 2 pax traveling together

itinerary.title: Arrival in Beijing
itinerary.description: Arrive in Beijing, transfer to hotel, free time. Overnight in Beijing.

itinerary.title: Beijing Landmarks City Tour (B)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. View the historic Forbidden City exterior and Temple of Heaven (featuring the Echo Wall). Overnight in Beijing.

itinerary.title: Great Wall (Juyong Pass) & Olympic Stadiums (B)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Tour the Great Wall of China at Juyong Pass, view the Bird's Nest stadium exterior, and shop at local markets. Overnight in Beijing.

itinerary.title: Bullet Train Beijing to Shanghai (B)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Board the 2nd-class bullet train to Shanghai. Arrive and transfer to your hotel. Overnight in Shanghai.

itinerary.title: Shanghai City Sights Tour (B)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Visit Jade Buddha Temple, Yu Yuan Market, Xin Tian Di, Nanjing Road, and walk along The Bund. Overnight in Shanghai.

itinerary.title: Huangpu River Cruise Dinner (B, D)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Spend the morning at leisure. In the evening, enjoy a romantic Huangpu River Cruise with dinner, experiencing Shanghai's skyline lit up. Overnight in Shanghai.

itinerary.title: Departure from Shanghai (B)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Transfer to the airport for your final departure.

title: Danang – Hanoi, Vietnam — 6 Days 5 Nights
highlights: Ba Na Hills cable car & Golden Bridge walk in Danang
Overnight train cabin experience Danang to Hanoi
Explore Hanoi Old Quarter ('The 36 Streets')
Full-day Halong Bay cruise with lunch and cave visits
inclusions: 4 Nights' hotel accommodation (double/twin sharing)
1 Night overnight train accommodation (double/twin cabin)
Daily breakfast (B), 1 Lunch on cruise (L), and 1 Buffet Lunch at Ba Na Hills
All sightseeing entry tickets & boat cruises
Private airport transfers and sightseeing transfers via SIC A/C coach
Drinking water on transfers (2x 500ml per person per day)
Vietnam e-visa processing support
exclusions: Meals & drinks not specified in the itinerary
Guide and driver tips (Compulsory: USD 3 per person per day)
Hotel, restaurant, or boat staff gratuities
visaChecklist: Vietnam e-visa is processed by the agency and included
Clear scanned copy of passport bio page
Digital passport photograph
termsAndConditions: 50% payment required at confirmation, remaining 50% due 10 days before departure
100% payment required if booking is made within 12 days of departure
Most airline tickets are non-refundable

Post-visa cancellations subject to up to 100% charge depending on airline/hotel policies
Guests manage their own immigration. Agency provides coordination letters only

itinerary.title: Arrival in Danang & City Tour
itinerary.description: Land in Danang. Meet our local guide and transfer to your hotel. Afternoon city orientation tour. Overnight in Danang.

itinerary.title: Ba Na Hills Scenic Peak & Golden Bridge (B, L)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Take the record-breaking cable car to Ba Na Hills. Walk the iconic Golden Bridge held by massive stone hands. Visit Linh Ung Pagoda (housing a 27m Buddha statue), Loc Uyen Garden, and enjoy rides at Fantasy Park. Enjoy a buffet lunch. Visit Ba Chua Thuong Ngan Temple at the 1,487m peak before descending. Overnight in Danang.

itinerary.title: Danang Leisure & Overnight Train to Hanoi (B)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Spend the day free for shopping and beach time. In the evening, transfer to the railway station for your overnight sleeper train journey to Hanoi. Overnight in train cabin.

itinerary.title: Hanoi Arrival & City Highlights Tour
itinerary.description: Arrive in Hanoi. Explore the capital's historical landmarks: Ba Dinh Square, Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum (outside), Temple of Literature (Vietnam's first university, built 1070), Hoan Kiem Lake, and the busy Old Quarter ('The 36 Streets'). Overnight in Hanoi.

itinerary.title: Hanoi – Halong Bay Scenic Day Cruise (B, L)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Take a 3.5–4 hour drive through the Red River Delta to Halong Bay. Board a traditional wooden junk cruise past famous karst rock formations (Stone Dog, Incense Burner, Fighting Cock). Enjoy lunch on board. Visit the spectacular Thien Cung and Dau Go caves. Return to Hanoi for overnight.

itinerary.title: Departure from Hanoi (B)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Leisure time until check-out (12:00) and transfer to Hanoi Airport for your departure flight.

title: Japan — 7 Nights 8 Days
highlights: Tokyo landmarks: Sensoji Temple and Skytree 350m observation deck
Day trip to Mount Fuji 5th Station and Gotemba Outlets
Shinkansen bullet train to Kyoto, Hiroshima, and Osaka
Hiroshima Atomic Bomb Dome and Itsukushima floating shrine
inclusions: Please contact our ticketing desk for live quotes and custom pricing packages. Full listings are provided upon inquiry.
exclusions: International flights, travel insurance, personal expenses, and tips are not pre-packaged.
visaChecklist: Original passport valid for 6+ months
Visa application form with photo attached
Detailed daily travel program
Last 6 months' bank statement and tax clearance certificate
termsAndConditions: Contact our team for customized departure options and group pricing.
Flights and accommodations are booked strictly upon confirmation.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Tokyo & VIP Hotel Transfer
itinerary.description: Arrive at Narita or Haneda Airport. Meet your guide and take a private transfer (1–1.5 hours) to your hotel. Welcome dinner included.

itinerary.title: Tokyo Sights: Asakusa & Skytree
itinerary.description: Visit the Imperial Palace exterior for photos. Explore Asakusa Sensoji Temple and the Nakamise shopping street. Ascend the Tokyo Skytree 350m observation deck (tickets included). Drive to Odaiba to view the Gundam Statue and Liberty Statue replica.

itinerary.title: Mount Fuji & Gotemba Outlets Day Trip
itinerary.description: Proceed to Mt. Fuji 5th Station (weather permitting). Explore Oshino Hakkai (UNESCO site featuring spring-fed ponds and a traditional village). Shop and dine at the Gotemba Premium Outlets. Return to Tokyo.

itinerary.title: Shinkansen to Kyoto & Arashiyama Bamboo
itinerary.description: Board the Shinkansen Bullet Train to Kyoto. Walk through the Arashiyama Bamboo Forest, Higashiyama District (Ninenzaka & Sanenzaka), Gion geisha district, and the red torii gates of Fushimi Inari Shrine. Check in to Kyoto hotel.

itinerary.title: Kyoto to Hiroshima & Peace Memorial Park
itinerary.description: Board the bullet train to Hiroshima. Visit the historic Atomic Bomb Dome and the Peace Memorial Park. Check in to your Hiroshima hotel.

itinerary.title: Miyajima Floating Torii & Shinkansen to Osaka
itinerary.description: Take the ferry to Miyajima Island. Visit the famous Itsukushima Shrine with its floating torii gate. Board the bullet train to Osaka. Climb the Umeda Sky Building for panoramic city views. Check in to Osaka hotel.

itinerary.title: Osaka Castle, Nara Deer Park & Dotonbori
itinerary.description: Take photos at Osaka Castle. Drive to Nara to visit Nara Deer Park and Todai-ji Temple (Great Buddha, tickets included). Evening shopping and street food tour at Shinsaibashi & Dotonbori. Overnight in Osaka.

itinerary.title: Osaka Departure
itinerary.description: Check out and take your transfer to Kansai International Airport for your departure flight.

title: Kazakhstan (Almaty) — 4 Nights 5 Days
highlights: Ascend to Shymbulak Ski Resort via 3-tier scenic gondola
Walk the promenade at Panfilov & Arbat pedestrian streets
Visit the famous Zenkov Cathedral, built entirely without nails
Take the cable car to Kok Tobe Hill for city views
inclusions: 4 Nights' accommodation at a 3-Star Hotel
Daily breakfast (B) and meals per program
All airport–hotel–airport transfers
Tours to Shymbulak Ski Resort and Almaty City Sights
Kazakhstan e-visa fee
exclusions: Tips for local guide and driver
Optional activities at Shymbulak (zip-lining, horse riding)
visaChecklist: Kazakhstan e-visa is processed by the agency and included
Scan of passport biographical page (6+ months validity)
termsAndConditions: 50% advance payment required for booking confirmation
Full payment required before arrival
Hotel grades are subject to availability
Fares and hotel surcharges are subject to change without notice

itinerary.title: Welcome to Almaty
itinerary.description: Arrival in Almaty. Clear customs and immigration. Meet & greet with your English-speaking guide at the airport and transfer to your 3-star hotel. Overnight in Almaty.

itinerary.title: Shymbulak Ski Resort & Arbat Walking Promenade
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Board the 3-tier gondola cable car to Shymbulak Ski Resort (3,200m). Enjoy a coffee at the highest bar in the CIS and panoramic mountain views. Optional activities include zip-lining, horse riding, or paragliding. In the evening, take a walking tour along Panfilov and Arbat streets, passing the Kazakh Opera & Ballet Theatre.

itinerary.title: Almaty City Sightseeing & Kok Tobe Hill (B)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Visit First President Park, Republic Square, State Opera & Ballet Theatre, Panfilov Park, and the spectacular Zenkov Cathedral (a 56m tall wooden cathedral built without nails). Ride the cable car to Kok Tobe Hill to see the 372m TV Tower and view the city skyline.

itinerary.title: Free Day for Shopping & Leisure (B)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Enjoy a full day at leisure to explore local bazaars, shop for souvenirs, and try local Kazakh cuisine.

itinerary.title: Departure from Almaty (B)
itinerary.description: Receive a packed breakfast. Check out of the hotel and transfer to Almaty Airport for your return flight.

title: Jordan — 5 Days 4 Nights (2 Pax)
highlights: Explore Jerash, the ancient Roman colonnaded city
Visit the Nabataean rock-carved city of Petra
2-Hour 4x4 desert safari and camp stay in Wadi Rum
Float in the mineral-rich waters of the Dead Sea
inclusions: Meet & assist after visa formalities at airport
2 Nights accommodation in Amman (BB - Olive Tree or similar)
1 Night accommodation in Wadi Rum (HB - Rum Oasis Camp or similar)
1 Night accommodation in Dead Sea (BB - Grand East or similar)
Private transfers in modern A/C vehicle with professional driver
Entrance fees to all mentioned historical sites (including Petra ticket)
Short horse ride in Petra
Mineral water in vehicle throughout the tour
English-speaking local guide at Jerash & Petra
2-Hour 4x4 desert ride in Wadi Rum
exclusions: International flights and airport visa fees
Lunches and dinners (except dinner at Wadi Rum camp)
Tips for guides, driver, horse boy, and hotel staff
visaChecklist: Passport valid for at least 6 months
Jordan visa on arrival coordinates provided by agency
termsAndConditions: Prices are calculated per person based on a private tour for 2 Pax
50% payment required at confirmation, balance due before arrival
Hotels are subject to availability — similar 4-star options provided if fully booked
Bank transfer fee is borne by the guest

itinerary.title: Queen Alia Airport Arrival – Amman
itinerary.description: Meet and assist at Queen Alia Airport after visa formalities. Private transfer to your hotel in Amman. Check in and overnight. (Olive Tree Hotel or similar)

itinerary.title: Amman City Landmarks & Roman Jerash (B)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Explore downtown Amman's souks, the Roman Theatre, and the Citadel ('Citadel of Rabbath Ammon'). Drive north to Jerash, the best-preserved Greco-Roman city in the Middle East. Walk colonnaded streets, temples, and amphitheaters. Return to Amman for overnight.

itinerary.title: Amman – Petra Nabataean City – Wadi Rum Desert (B, D)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Drive to Petra, the rose-red Nabataean city carved into sandstone cliffs. Walk through the narrow Siq gorge to see the Treasury, Street of Facades, and Royal Tombs. Continue to Wadi Rum. Board a 4x4 vehicle for a 2-hour desert ride. Check into your desert camp, enjoy a traditional dinner under the stars, and overnight. (Rum Oasis Camp or similar)

itinerary.title: Wadi Rum – Dead Sea Relax (B)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at camp. Transfer to the Dead Sea, the lowest point on earth. Check into your resort. Spend the day floating in the salty, mineral-rich waters. Overnight at the Dead Sea. (Grand East Resort or similar)

itinerary.title: Dead Sea – Queen Alia Airport Departure (B)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Check out. Private transfer to Queen Alia Airport for your departure flight.

title: Jagannath Puri (Bhubaneswar – Puri – Chilika), India
highlights: Explore 11th-century Lingaraj Temple and temples of Bhubaneswar
Visit Dhauli Peace Pagoda and Konark Sun Temple (UNESCO Site)
Relax at Puri Golden Beach and visit Jagannath Temple
Boat ride at Chilika Lake (Satapada) to spot Irrawaddy Dolphins
inclusions: Flight coordinates: Indigo 6E flights (IXB-CCU-BBI and BBI-IXB)
Standard transfer vehicles provided for sightseeing routes.
Check with our inquiry form for package pricing details.
exclusions: Meals, personal expenses, temple offerings, and guide tips are not pre-packaged.
visaChecklist: No visa required for Nepalese citizens traveling to India (must carry valid citizenship certificate or passport)
termsAndConditions: Flight ticket cost is subject to seat availability at booking.
Non-Hindus are not permitted inside the inner sanctum of the Jagannath Temple.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Bhubaneswar & Temple Tour
itinerary.description: Arrive in Bhubaneswar. Meet our representative and transfer to your hotel. Visit the 11th-century Lingaraj Temple, Mukteshwar Temple (representing Kalinga architecture), Rajarani Temple, and Brahmeswar Temple. Evening shopping at Ekamra Haat craft market. Overnight in Bhubaneswar.

itinerary.title: Bhubaneswar – Dhauli – Konark – Puri
itinerary.description: Drive to Puri. En route, visit Dhauli Peace Pagoda (site of the Kalinga War) and Pipli (applique handicraft village). Continue to the Konark Sun Temple (UNESCO Site) and Chandrabhaga Beach. Relax at Golden Beach, Puri. Overnight in Puri.

itinerary.title: Jagannath Temple & Chilika Lake (Satapada)
itinerary.description: Visit the sacred Jagannath Temple (Note: non-Hindus are not permitted inside). Browse local Puri markets. In the afternoon, drive to Satapada on Chilika Lake. Enjoy a boat ride to spot Irrawaddy Dolphins and watch the sunset. Overnight in Puri.

itinerary.title: Puri – Raghurajpur Artists Village – Bhubaneswar
itinerary.description: Drive back to Bhubaneswar. En route, visit Raghurajpur Heritage Village (famous for Pattachitra painters). Visit the Odisha State Tribal Museum and Khandagiri & Udayagiri Caves (ancient Jain rock-cut caves). Optional shopping at Esplanade Mall. Overnight in Bhubaneswar.

itinerary.title: Departure from Bhubaneswar
itinerary.description: Optional visit to Nandankanan Zoological Park. Transfer to Bhubaneswar Airport or railway station for your departure flight.

title: Maldives — 4 Days (5-Star, Sea Plane Resort)
highlights: Stay at Madifushi Private Island Maldives luxury resort
Overnight in a spectacular Over-Water Villa
Romantic floating breakfast in the pool
Relaxing 30-Min Balinese Massage at Mandara Spa

Daily buffet breakfast and buffet dinner at BlueFin restaurant
Daily set BBQ menu option at Mojito
One floating breakfast and one minibar setup on arrival
One guided snorkeling trip
One 30-min Balinese massage at Mandara Spa per person
USD 100 net dining credit per room per stay (dine-in only, excludes room service)
Return seaplane transfers from Malé Airport
visaChecklist: Maldives tourist visa on arrival is free for Nepalese passport holders
Must carry passport valid for 6+ months and confirmed hotel booking
termsAndConditions: 50% payment required at booking confirmation
Price calculated per person on twin-sharing basis
Surcharge may apply for itinerary alterations
Rooms and seaplane slots are subject to availability

itinerary.title: Arrival in Malé & Seaplane Transfer to Resort
itinerary.description: Arrive at Velana International Airport, Malé. Board your luxury seaplane transfer to Madifushi Private Island. Check in to your Beach Villa. Enjoy dinner at BlueFin restaurant. Overnight at resort.

itinerary.title: Resort Leisure & Guided Snorkeling Trip (B, D)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at BlueFin. Enjoy your guided snorkeling trip at the resort's house reef. Spend the day relaxing on the white sand beaches. Dinner at BlueFin. Overnight in Beach Villa.

itinerary.title: Over-Water Villa Transition & Floating Breakfast (B, D)
itinerary.description: Experience a luxurious floating breakfast served in your private pool. Transfer and check into your Over-Water Villa. Enjoy your 30-min Balinese massage at Mandara Spa. Dinner at BlueFin or set BBQ menu at Mojito. Overnight in Over-Water Villa.

itinerary.title: Seaplane Transfer & Departure (B)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at BlueFin. Free time until check-out. Board the return seaplane transfer to Malé Airport for your international departure flight.

title: Maldives — 4 Days Standard Tour
highlights: Experience both Beach Villa and Over-Water Villa accommodations
Round-trip shared speedboat transfers from Malé Airport
Leisure time for beach relaxing and optional diving
inclusions: 2 Nights' accommodation in a Beach Villa
1 Night's accommodation in an Over-Water Villa
Half-board meal plan (Daily breakfast and dinner)
Shared return speedboat airport transfers
All local taxes and green fees
exclusions: Optional water sports (scuba diving, undersea walk)
visaChecklist: Maldives tourist visa is issued on arrival free of charge for Nepalese citizens
Passport valid for at least 6 months and valid return tickets required
termsAndConditions: 50% payment required at booking to secure resort reservations
Price based on twin/double-sharing basis
Speedboat transfers operate on fixed schedules

itinerary.title: Arrival & Speedboat Transfer
itinerary.description: Arrive at Malé Airport. Clear immigration, meet the resort coordinator, and take a shared speedboat transfer to the island. Check in to your Beach Villa. Overnight in Maldives.

itinerary.title: Beach Villa Leisure Day (B)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at the resort. Enjoy a free day to relax on the beach or try optional water sports (scuba diving, underwater sea walk). Overnight in Beach Villa.

itinerary.title: Water Villa Transition & Relax (B)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at the resort. Check out of Beach Villa and transfer to your luxury Over-Water Villa. Spend the day enjoying the lagoon views. Overnight in Over-Water Villa.

itinerary.title: Departure from Maldives (B)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at the resort. Check out and take the speedboat transfer back to Malé Airport for your international return flight.

title: Thailand – Singapore – Malaysia — 9 Nights 10 Days
highlights: Speedboat tour to Coral Island (Koh Larn) with lunch in Pattaya
Guided city & temple tours in Bangkok, Singapore, and Kuala Lumpur
Sentosa Island cable car & Wings of Time ticket in Singapore
Genting Highlands cable car and Lord Murugan statue at Batu Caves
inclusions: Airfare: KTM–Bangkok, Bangkok–Singapore, and Kuala Lumpur–KTM
Private airport pickup and drop-off (other sightseeing transfers SIC basis)
3-Star Hotel accommodations with daily breakfast
1 Complimentary lunch on Coral Island tour
City & temple tours in Bangkok, Singapore, and Kuala Lumpur
Sentosa Island tickets (1-way cable car + Wings of Time show)
Genting Highland 1-way cable car ticket and Batu Caves visit
Single-entry visa fees for Thailand and Malaysia
Singapore to Kuala Lumpur express coach ticket
exclusions: Malaysia hotel tourism tax (10 MYR per room per night, paid locally at check-in)
Tips for guides, drivers, and hotel staff
visaChecklist: Passport valid for at least 6 months
Last 4 months' bank statements with a minimum closing balance of NPR 100,000
1 recent passport-size photo (white background)
Clear scan of citizenship certificate (front & back)
Visa fees are non-refundable once applied. Refusal is at embassy discretion
termsAndConditions: Cancellation Policy: 15+ days before departure — standard cancellation fee; 14–4 days before departure — 60% of package cost; within 3 days — 100% of package cost (non-refundable)
Price calculated per person on twin-sharing basis
GDS flights are subject to seat availability at booking

itinerary.title: Arrival in Bangkok & Pattaya Transfer
itinerary.description: Meet and greet at Bangkok airport. Private transfer to Pattaya. Check into your hotel and overnight.

itinerary.title: Coral Island Speedboat Tour (L)
itinerary.description: Board a speedboat to Coral Island (Koh Larn) through the Gulf of Thailand. Swim, snorkel, or relax on the white sands. Enjoy a delicious Indian lunch. Afternoon free for leisure. Overnight in Pattaya.

itinerary.title: Pattaya to Bangkok Transit
itinerary.description: Transfer to Bangkok. Check into your hotel. Explore the city's sights and temples on a guided tour. Overnight in Bangkok.

itinerary.title: Bangkok to Singapore Flight
itinerary.description: Check out. Transfer to Bangkok Airport for your flight to Singapore. Arrive and transfer to your Singapore hotel. Overnight in Singapore.

itinerary.title: Singapore City & Sentosa Island Tour
itinerary.description: Enjoy a half-day Singapore city tour. In the afternoon, proceed to Sentosa Island via cable car and watch the Wings of Time show. Overnight in Singapore.

itinerary.title: Singapore to Kuala Lumpur Coach
itinerary.description: Board the express coach from Singapore to Kuala Lumpur. Arrive and transfer to your hotel. Overnight in Kuala Lumpur.

itinerary.title: Kuala Lumpur Leisure Day
itinerary.description: Spend the day shopping or exploring the landmarks of Kuala Lumpur. Overnight in Kuala Lumpur.

itinerary.title: Kuala Lumpur Landmarks City Tour
itinerary.description: Explore the city's highlights: National Monument, a photo stop at the King's Palace gate, Jamek Mosque, and House of Parliament. Overnight in Kuala Lumpur.

itinerary.title: Genting Highland Excursion & Batu Caves
itinerary.description: Ride the Skyway cable car (1-way ticket included) up to Genting Highlands (2,000m) containing Malaysia's only casino and theme parks. En route, visit the 400-million-year-old Hindu cave temple at Batu Caves and view the 42.7m Lord Murugan statue. Overnight in Kuala Lumpur.

itinerary.title: Departure from Kuala Lumpur
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Check out. Private transfer to Kuala Lumpur Airport for your return flight.

title: Sri Lanka & Maldives Combined Tour — 7 Days
highlights: Climb Sigiriya Lion Rock ('Fortress in the Sky' UNESCO site)
Visit Kandy Temple of the Sacred Tooth Relic
Stay in Beach & Over-water Villas at Sun Siyam Olhuveli Maldives
inclusions: 3 Nights accommodation in Sri Lanka (Camelia Dambulla, Club Bentota, Best Western Colombo)
2 Nights Beach Villa + 1 Night Over-Water Villa at Sun Siyam Olhuveli Maldives
Daily breakfast (B) and dinner (D) in Sri Lanka; Half-board plan in Maldives
A/C private vehicle transport in Sri Lanka with English-speaking chauffeur guide
VAT and airport meet & assist services
Entrance tickets included: Sigiriya, Dambulla Cave Temple, Peradeniya Botanical Garden, Kandy Temple, Turtle Hatchery, Madu River Boat Ride, Gangaramaya Temple
One water sports activity in Bentota (choice of jet ski, banana boat, or tube ride)
exclusions: Lunches on tour during the Sri Lanka portion
Tips for guide, driver, and hotel staff
visaChecklist: Sri Lanka ETA visa fee and Maldives visa on arrival is required
Passport valid for at least 6 months and visa application files coordinated by agency
termsAndConditions: 50% payment required at time of confirmation
Rates based on per person twin-sharing basis
No services blocked until booking is finalized

itinerary.title: Arrival in Colombo – Dambulla (D)
itinerary.description: Meet & greet at Colombo Airport. Transfer to your resort in Dambulla. Enjoy dinner. Overnight in Dambulla. (Camelia Resort & Spa or similar)

itinerary.title: Sigiriya Rock – Kandy Lake – Bentota Beach (B, D)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Climb the 5th-century Sigiriya Lion Rock. Drive to Kandy city. Visit the Temple of the Sacred Tooth Relic and view Kandy Lake ('Sea of Milk'). Drive to the beach resort town of Bentota. Dinner and overnight. (Club Bentota or similar)

itinerary.title: Bentota Water Sports – Colombo Sights (B, D)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Enjoy one water sports activity (jet ski or tube ride). Drive to Colombo. Visit Gangaramaya Temple, Independence Memorial Hall, Galle Face Green, and Pettah Floating Market. Dinner and overnight. (Best Western or similar)

itinerary.title: Flight to Malé & Beach Villa Check-in (B, D)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Transfer to Colombo Airport for your flight to Malé, Maldives. Board speedboat transfer to Sun Siyam Olhuveli resort. Check into your Beach Villa. Overnight at resort.

itinerary.title: Maldives Island Leisure Day (B, L, D)
itinerary.description: Enjoy a free day at the resort. Swim, snorkel, or sunbathe on the beach. All meals included (Half-Board). Overnight in Beach Villa.

itinerary.title: Over-Water Villa Relaxation (B, L, D)
itinerary.description: Transfer and check into your luxury Over-Water Villa. Relax over the lagoon and enjoy resort amenities. Overnight in Over-Water Villa.

itinerary.title: Departure from Maldives (B)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at resort. Speedboat transfer to Malé Airport for your departure flight.

title: Turkey — 5 Nights 6 Days (Istanbul + Cappadocia)
highlights: Old City Tour including Blue Mosque, Hagia Sophia & Topkapi
Princes' Island Büyükada cruise with optional bicycle tour
Cappadocia North Tour exploring Göreme and fairy chimneys
Stay in Konak Taksim and Dedeli Konak Cave Hotels
inclusions: 3 Nights in Istanbul (Konak Taksim Hotel - BB)
2 Nights in Cappadocia (Dedeli Konak Cave Hotel - BB)
Daily breakfast (B) and lunches on tours per program
Shared regular SIC tours per itinerary
Private airport transfers (IST/SAW to hotel)
English-speaking licensed guide
All entry fees to listed sites and museums
Air-conditioned non-smoking sanitized coach transport
Local taxes & VAT
exclusions: International and domestic flights (KTM-IST-KTM and Istanbul-Nevsehir)
SAW airport transfer incurs +10 EUR surcharge one-way
visaChecklist: Passport valid for at least 6 months
Turkey tourist visa application coordinated by agency
termsAndConditions: Price calculated per person in double room occupancy
Tours run on SIC (shared) basis, while airport transfers are private
Grand Bazaar closed Sundays, Topkapi Palace closed Tuesdays
Standard check-in from 14:00, check-out until 12:00

itinerary.title: Istanbul Arrival
itinerary.description: Arrive at Istanbul (IST or SAW) Airport. Private transfer to your hotel. Check in and overnight in Istanbul. (Konak Taksim Hotel)

itinerary.title: Panoramic Istanbul Old City Tour (B, L)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Old City tour (no entrance fees) visiting Blue Mosque (Sultan Ahmed), the Hippodrome of Constantinople, Hagia Sophia (outside), and Topkapi Palace (outside). Explore the Grand Bazaar (~4,000 shops) and enjoy lunch at a local restaurant. Overnight in Istanbul.

itinerary.title: Princes' Islands Excursion (B, L)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Board a ferry to Büyükada, the largest of the Princes' Islands. Enjoy lunch and free time (optional bicycle rentals, visiting Aya Yorgi Church, or beach relaxing). Return ferry to Istanbul for overnight.

itinerary.title: Fly to Cappadocia (B)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Check out. Private transfer to Istanbul Airport for your domestic flight to Kayseri or Nevşehir. Transfer to your cave hotel in Cappadocia. Overnight in Cappadocia. (Dedeli Konak Cave Hotel)

itinerary.title: Cappadocia North Landscapes Tour (B, L)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Visit Göreme Esentepe viewpoint, Göreme Valley panorama, and Paşabağ (Monks Valley) fairy chimneys. Explore Zelve Open Air Museum and the lunar landscape of Devrent Valley. View Üçhisar Castle exterior and visit Avanos pottery workshop. Overnight in Cappadocia.

itinerary.title: Cappadocia Departure (B)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Check out (12:00) and take your private transfer to Kayseri or Nevşehir airport.

title: Turkey — 6 Nights 7 Days (Istanbul + Cappadocia + Pamukkale)
highlights: Sunrise hot air balloon flight (45–60 mins) in Cappadocia
Walk the white travertine hot springs terraces at Pamukkale
Princes' Island cruise passing local islets
Cave Hotel stay in Nevşehir and boutique stay in Aydın
inclusions: Private return airport transfers; shared SIC tours
3 Nights in Istanbul (Dora/Taksim Express 4-Star - BB)
1 Night in Cappadocia (Abras/Romantic Cave 4-Star - BB)
1 Night in Aydın/Kuşadası (Efe Boutique 4-Star - BB)
Daily breakfast (B) and lunches on tours per program
Air-conditioned luxury coach transport with English guide
All entrance fees per itinerary
Sunrise Hot Air Balloon flight in Cappadocia (includes flight certificate)
visaChecklist: Passport valid for at least 6 months
Turkey tourist visa required
termsAndConditions: Cancellation Policy: <15 days before arrival = 50% of booking value; <7 days = 100% of booking value
Full payment due by arrival day. Flight tickets are subject to availability
Credit card payments subject to 3% transaction fee; bank transfers subject to EUR 50 fee
Grand Bazaar closed Sundays, Topkapi Palace closed Tuesdays

itinerary.title: Istanbul Airport Arrival
itinerary.description: Meet your guide at the airport and transfer (~1.5 hours) to your 4-star hotel in Istanbul. Check in and overnight.

itinerary.title: Old City Highlights Tour (B)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Tour Hagia Sophia (outside), Topkapi Palace (outside), Hippodrome, Blue Mosque, and the Grand Bazaar. Overnight in Istanbul.

itinerary.title: Fly to Cappadocia & Panorama Tour (B, L)
itinerary.description: Check out. Transfer to Istanbul airport, fly to Kayseri, and transfer to Cappadocia (~1.5 hours). Visit Göreme Valley panorama, Üçhisar Castle panorama, Pigeon Valley, and check into your cave hotel. Lunch included. Overnight in Cappadocia.

itinerary.title: Cappadocia Sunrise Balloon & Fly to Izmir (B, L)
itinerary.description: Early morning sunrise hot air balloon flight (45 mins–1 hour, weather permitting). Return to hotel for breakfast. Tour Özkonak Underground City, a pottery workshop, Zelve Open Air Museum, Paşabağ, and Love Valley. Transfer to Kayseri airport, fly to Izmir, and transfer to your Aydın hotel. Overnight in Aydın.

itinerary.title: Pamukkale Cotton Castle Hot Springs (B, L)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Visit Pamukkale ('Cotton Castle') white travertine terraces and hot springs (35°C). Lunch included. Check out and transfer to Denizli Airport. Fly to Istanbul and check into your hotel. Overnight in Istanbul.

itinerary.title: Princes' Island Cruise (B, L)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Sail to Büyükada passing Kınalıada, Burgazada, and Heybeliada. Enjoy lunch at a local restaurant on the island and free time. Return ferry to Istanbul for overnight.

itinerary.title: Departure from Istanbul (B)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Check out. Transfer to Istanbul airport for your final departure.

title: Netherlands – France – Switzerland — 7 Nights 8 Days
highlights: Zaanse Schans windmills and Marken Lake cruise in Holland
Explore Bruges ('Venice of the North') in Belgium
Paris Eiffel Tower 2nd floor & Seine River cruise tickets
Scenic bus journey to Switzerland and Lucerne city tour
inclusions: 7 Nights accommodation at 3-Star Hotels
Daily breakfast (B)
Rembrandtplein (Amsterdam) and city tours in Amsterdam & Paris
Montmartre district cable car + Versailles Palace visit (entrance not included)
IJsselmeer Lake cruise (Volendam–Marken)
Seine River cruise tickets (75-minute)
Diamond Cutting Workshop demonstration in Amsterdam
Eiffel Tower 2nd floor access tickets
Paris to Zurich long-distance coach ticket
Lucerne city tour and Swiss mountain transfers
Hotel–station/airport transfers
International round-trip flights
exclusions: Personal expenses, drinks, and unscheduled meals
visaChecklist: Original passport valid for 6+ months from travel date with min. 2 blank pages
2 recent photos (3.5x4.5cm, white background)
Company registration/VAT/PAN documents (self-employed)
No Objection Certificate (NOC) and pay slips (employed)
Last 6 months' bank statements in Euro (min. closing balance 10 Lakhs)
Property valuation reports, relationship certificate, covering letter
termsAndConditions: 50% payment required at booking/confirmation to hold flights & hotel slots
Price per person on twin-sharing basis
Surcharge may apply if client requests changes to package
Full amount non-refundable after confirmation
No rooms/services blocked until confirmation

itinerary.title: Amsterdam Arrival
itinerary.description: Arrive in Amsterdam. Transfer to your hotel. Rest of the day at leisure. Check hotel reception for tour start details. Overnight in Amsterdam.

itinerary.title: Zaanse Schans Windmills, Volendam & Amsterdam (B)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Visit Zaanse Schans to view traditional canals and windmills. Head to Volendam fishing village. Take the boat to Marken to see stilt houses. Afternoon city tour of Amsterdam including canals, official buildings, and parks. Visit a diamond-cutting workshop. Overnight in Amsterdam.

itinerary.title: Amsterdam – Bruges (Belgium) – Paris (France) (B)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Travel to Bruges, the 'Venice of the North'. Walk its cobblestone streets and sample Belgian chocolate. Continue on to Paris. Overnight in Paris.

itinerary.title: Versailles Palace & Paris Landmarks City Tour (B)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Visit the Palace of Versailles and its gardens (entrance fee excluded). Climb up to Montmartre via the included cable car. Enjoy a panoramic guided city tour of Paris. Overnight in Paris.

itinerary.title: Eiffel Tower & Seine River Cruise (B)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Access the Eiffel Tower 2nd floor (tickets included). Board a 75-minute Seine river boat cruise. Afternoon at leisure. (Note: Eiffel Tower visit may be rescheduled if queues are excessive). Overnight in Paris.

itinerary.title: Paris to Zurich (Switzerland) Scenic Transfer (B)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Board a comfortable transfer bus from Paris to Zurich, enjoying scenic views of valleys and alpine ranges. Check in to your hotel. Overnight in Zurich.

itinerary.title: Lucerne Day Trip (B)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Take a day trip to the lakeside town of Lucerne. Tour the town, walk the Chapel Bridge, and enjoy lake views. Return to Zurich for overnight.

itinerary.title: Departure from Zurich (B)
itinerary.description: Breakfast at hotel. Tour ends. Transfer to Zurich Airport for your international return flight.
